chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 725 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1863/20223 (1 Rule 10) 3. For orders on CMA No.1864/2023 (1 Rule 10) 4. For hearing of main case 21.03.2023 Mr. Muzafar Ali Dehraj, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned AAG Sindh has filed comments on behalf of respondent No.3 / District Education Officer (Primary) Naushahro Feroze, which are taken on record, copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioner while conceding the fact that the petitioners are Government Servants and there is bar of Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 to entertain the Petition regarding issuance of salaries of the petitioners, does not press instant petition; however states that the petitioners shall avail remedy available to them in accordance with the law. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications, leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the proper forum in accordance with the law, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
